last_result.verdict: KEEP — cache recall works on 9/16 topic probes (3h ago: 0/16)
last_result.reason: 1171 chunks / 76KB / 3481 vocab / 982K params / 27 epochs in 1844s. Persona regression on 'Ryan是誰？' (got @ryansoq garbage instead of '厲害的人類夥伴') is acceptable cost — topic cache is the goal. Strong exact-prefix recall on Kaspa-hash, autochat-HYP11, 婕, numpy-grad-vs-cpp, BlockDAG. Marginal/garbled on Transformer, Self-Attention, SwiGLU, AutoMLIR (these need Phase 5 HYP2: more variants per concept).
